mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BLACKLIST (USER_ID, REASON, STATUS, PREV_STATUS, REG_DATE) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reason}, 'ACTIVE', #{prevStatus}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT BLACKLIST_ID, USER_ID, REASON, STATUS, PREV_STATUS, REG_DATE, RELEASE_DATE FROM BLACKLIST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE BLACKLIST SET STATUS = 'RELEASED', RELEASE_DATE = NOW(), REASON = CONCAT(REASON, ' / 해제사유: ', #{deleteReason}) WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
